package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for http_client_allocated_per_call_without_reuse: http.Client literals allocated on regular call paths instead of being reused as shared client state.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: info.
func scenario379Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	client := &http.Client{}
	return client.Get(url)
}
